label: Relative_Walkability
definition:
Data Source: National Walkability Index (https://www.epa.gov/smartgrowth/smart-location-mapping#walkability)

Census Block Group

Cross-sectional

Years Available: Cross-sectional

Model: Rank-based approach using intersection density, proximity to transit stops, and diversity of land uses

Model Specification/Citation: https://www.epa.gov/sites/default/files/2021-06/documents/national_walkability_index_methodology_and_user_guide_june2021.pdf
